title: azarolus alpina
intro: Azarolus alpina, also known as the alpine hawthorn, is a shrub or small tree species belonging to the family Rosaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Azarolus alpina include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
